summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Scalable Phase 2 - AI scan flow and Connect page. All core functionality working perfectly including AI-powered route discovery, scanning animation, risk assessment, and frontend-backend integration.
passed_tests: POST /api/projects/:id/scan - scans project repo with AI agents, returns route count + breakdown
GET /api/projects/:id/routes - returns discovered routes sorted by risk (green first)
Demo fallback with QuickBite repo uses hardcoded source code successfully
Scan result stores discovered_routes in MongoDB with correct fields
Project status transitions from 'draft' → 'scanning' → 'configuring' after scan
Frontend /connect page shows repo URL input with 'Scan Codebase' button
Frontend scanning animation shows 3 steps (Code Analyst, Security Auditor, Risk Assessment)
Frontend scan complete state shows route count (21) and green/yellow/red breakdown (11/3/7)
Frontend sidebar highlights 'Connect' when on /connect page
Creating new project from /connect page (without projectId param) works
Navigating with ?projectId=xxx pre-loads project data correctly
AI integration with Claude via Emergent Universal Key working
Scan completes in ~50 seconds with proper timeout handling
Real-time status updates during scanning process
Route discovery finds 21 routes with proper risk categorization
All Phase 1 functionality still working (auth, dashboard, projects)
